title: Welcome
text:
📦 Data Analysis Toolkit for FNS
Welcome! This site contains a collection of interactive notebooks, examples, and guidance for students in Food and Nutritional Sciences.
Browse the sections above to explore foundational and advanced material in Python programming, data wrangling, statistical analysis, and more.

title: 🚀 Example Notebook: Advanced Methods
text: This notebook introduces Bayesian methods and working with databases or APIs.

title: 🧪 Student Mini-Project Template
text: Use this notebook as a starting point for your independent data project.

text:

title: 🔬 T-Tests and ANOVA
text:
Code
from scipy import stats
stats.ttest_ind(df['Height'][:50], df['Height'][50:])

title: 📊 Summary Statistics and Distributions
text:
Code
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
sns.histplot(df['Height'], kde=True)
plt.show()
